news.headline: Salesforce is on an AI buying spree, but Wall Street still has its doubts
news.summary: The company has announced three deals in the month of June alone.

news.headline: Our rating, price target and outlook for newly spun off Honeywell Aerospace
news.summary: Given the robust backlog, streamlined operations, and high demand for its products, we see plenty of upside in our newest position.

news.headline: Digital-Asset Treasury Companies Continue to Accumulate Crypto. But Are Any of Them Worth Buying?
news.summary: These companies work best when the prices of their underlying assets are rising rather than falling.

news.headline: Stock Market Today, June 29: Nasdaq Composite Outperforms as Tech Stocks Gain on Easing Geopolitical Tensions
news.summary: Today, June 29, 2026, investors welcomed relief in risk assets as U.S.-Iran tensions cooled ahead of a key summit.

news.headline: Apple’s gamble just exposed the AI bubble’s fatal flaw
news.summary: On June 25, Apple (AAPL) raised prices on iPads and MacBooks due to skyrocketing memory chip costs, according to Reuters. The stock dipped that same day, closing 6% lower and losing more than $260 billion in market cap.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $724.08 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $741.00 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into tomorrow: Strong Bullish — favor calls / long delta.
Use QQQ $724.08 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: LLY CALL — enter $34.70–$38.36, target $54.80+, stop $21.92.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Stocks closed higher with SPY +1.65% and QQQ +2.49%. Composite sentiment +67 (Strong Bullish). The tape is being driven mainly by spy trend, qqq / mega-cap tech, vix. VIX at 12.97 (-4.07%). Environment read: favor calls / long delta. Leadership came from Consumer Discretionary; Industrials lagged. Today's standouts: TSLA +8.46%, GOOGL +4.82%. Laggards: MSFT -1.18%, BA -1.18%. Carrying LLY as the top idea into tomorrow (7.5/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
